message.content: Search the codebase for any files or references related to "stack-frame-layout", "vscale", "optimization-remarks", or vector register spill detection patterns. Look in all text files, docs, prompts, tmp directories, etc. I need to understand what the stderr output format looks like when iree-compile is run with --iree-llvmcpu-optimization-remarks=stack-frame-layout. Also search for any prompt/ files that might have examples.

content.text: I'll search the codebase for these keywords and examine the relevant files.
